project_info.name: Workout Drop Plinko Gym
project_info.description: Offline workout tracker with Plinko game mechanics.
project_info.archetype: Electric & Neon (7) mixed with Performance Pro (2)
rules: App name MUST NOT be shown on any screens.
Strict Hacksaw Gaming Plinko palette: dark grey/black board, neon blue/green pegs, specific cell colors.
Flat cartoonish art style. Use 2px solid strokes and bright glowing borders.
No user authentication, fully offline using localStorage.
Every interactive element must include data-testid.

spacing_and_layout.container: w-full max-w-md mx-auto flex flex-col min-h-screen bg-[#050505]

buttons.primary: bg-[#00D1FF] text-black font-black uppercase tracking-widest py-4 px-6 rounded-2xl border-b-4 border-[#0099CC] active:translate-y-1 active:border-b-0 transition-all
buttons.beast: bg-[#FF3B30] text-white font-black uppercase tracking-widest py-4 px-6 rounded-2xl border-b-4 border-[#B22019] shadow-[0_0_20px_rgba(255,59,48,0.5)] active:translate-y-1 active:border-b-0 transition-all
buttons.secondary: bg-[#1A1A1E] text-white font-bold py-3 px-6 rounded-xl border-2 border-[#27272A] active:bg-[#27272A] transition-all

cards.workout_card: bg-[#121214] border-2 border-[#27272A] rounded-2xl p-5 flex flex-col gap-3 shadow-md
cards.plinko_cell: flex flex-col items-center justify-center rounded-lg border-2 font-black text-sm h-16 shadow-[inset_0_-4px_0_rgba(0,0,0,0.3)]
cards.badge: bg-[#1A1A1E] border-2 border-[#FFD700] rounded-full p-4 flex items-center justify-center text-[#FFD700] shadow-[0_0_15px_rgba(255,215,0,0.2)]

inputs.text: bg-[#050505] border-2 border-[#27272A] rounded-xl px-4 py-3 text-white focus:border-[#00D1FF] focus:outline-none transition-colors

features: 3 slides: Set up exercises, Drop the ball, Hit Beast Mode
welcome.layout_rules: Full screen carousel, prominent bold imagery/icons, bottom sticky CTA. Use framer-motion for slide transitions.

main.layout_rules: Plinko board hero section takes top 40%. Dark flat bento boxes for recent stats below.

drop_screen.layout_rules: Board takes up most of the viewport. Toggle and Drop button locked to bottom safe area.

workout.layout_rules: Scrollable list of thick dark cards. Timer sticky at top or bottom.

summary.layout_rules: Celebratory UI, large badge displays, high contrast gold accents for PRs.

progress.layout_rules: Bento grid for stats. Use Shadcn/Recharts in neon colors for data visualization.

settings.layout_rules: Standard mobile settings list, thick row items, destructive red buttons for reset.

motion_and_interaction.beast_mode_hit: Screen pulses red, background shifts to #2A0808, fire particle effect using CSS or framer-motion.
motion_and_interaction.pr_alert: Gold flash overlay (opacity 0 to 1 to 0), scale up text animation.
motion_and_interaction.plinko_drop: Physics-based bounce effect. Use framer-motion keyframes to animate a kettlebell icon hitting dots and landing in a colored cell.
motion_and_interaction.general: Snappy, spring-based interactions for all buttons and interactive cards.

icons_library: phosphor-icons (Weight: fill for bold cartoonish look)

images.description: Dark kettlebell, use for Plinko ball visual reference or as an intro background.
Neon geometric shapes on dark background. Good for Welcome screen backgrounds or Beast mode texture.
Rusty kettlebell on gym floor. Ideal for Workout Summary background with dark overlay.

instructions_to_main_agent: Ensure 'react-router-dom' is used to navigate the 7 distinct screens.
Build Plinko board using an HTML/Tailwind CSS grid. 12 rows of dots (pegs). Bottom row contains 7 cells colored according to 'plinko' palette.
Kettlebell ball: Use a Phosphor <Barbell /> or <Weight /> icon styled with metallic colors and drop-shadow, unless rendering custom SVG.
DO NOT show the app name text anywhere on the screen layout.
Build custom toggle for Risk Level: Easy (Blue/Green dominant) vs Beast (Red dominant).
When Beast Mode hits, add a conditional class to the main wrapper to change the background to 'beast_mode_bg' and add a red glow.
Implement all buttons with 'tactile' 3D flat styling (border-b-4). Strip away standard Shadcn thin borders.
Use localStorage for all data persistence (Workout history, exercises, settings).
Add data-testid attributes to every button, input, and interactive card.
